metadata.description: AI agents for Psilodigital's consulting workflows — sales, proposals, and delivery. Install one domain at a time.

plugins.name: sales
plugins.description: Sales agent for prospect research, discovery call prep, outreach drafting, and follow-up — runs on Psilodigital's company context and tone of voice.

plugins.name: proposals
plugins.description: Business analyst + solution architect agents that turn meeting notes into proposals and MVP scopes — with assumptions, risks, and open questions made explicit.

plugins.name: delivery
plugins.description: Delivery manager + solution architect + devops agents that convert approved scope into milestones, GitHub issues, and implementation plans.
